ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., local, national, presidential) */,
  "last_election" TEXT /* Date of the last election */,
  "next_election" TEXT /* Date of the next election */,
  "electoral_system" INTEGER /* Electoral system used (foreign key to electoral_systems) */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area where the election is held (e.g., state, country) */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats in the election */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout in the last election */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Current status of the election (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_electoral_system FOREIGN KEY ("electoral_system") REFERENCES electoral_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_bodies" (
  "body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government body */,
  "body_name" TEXT /* Name of the government body */,
  "no_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the government body */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area where the government body operates (e.g., state, country) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the government body was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the government body information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the electoral system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the electoral system */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Detailed method of voting (e.g., single transferable vote, preferential voting) */,
  "proportional_representation" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if proportional representation is used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the electoral system information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate participated in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party the candidate is affiliated with */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the candidate (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "body_id" INTEGER /* ID of the government body the appointment was made to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate appointed */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date the term of the appointment starts */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date the term of the appointment ends */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., active, pending, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_id") REFERENCES government_bodies ("body_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representation" (
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representation record */,
  "body_id" INTEGER /* ID of the government body */,
  "no_of_women" INTEGER /* Number of women in the government body */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of women in the government body */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area where the representation is tracked (e.g., state, country) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the representation information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representation_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_id") REFERENCES government_bodies ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
